problem id: d08ef8d1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  00011000 -> 11000000
  10001111 -> 00011100
  10111001 -> 11001101
  10111010 -> 10010101
  01011101 -> 01001010
  10101000 -> 01000101
  11110101 -> 00001111
  11111110 -> 00110111
  10010000 -> 10000100
  00000111 -> 00011000

query: 11110111
predicted answer: 00011111
